channel.title: BSHmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BSHmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NYT Strands Hints and Answers for Saturday, April 25
item.description: Need help with today's NYT Strands puzzle? Extra hints and the full answer set are available to help players complete the grid and maintain their streak.

item.title: New Streaming Releases This Weekend Across Netflix, Hulu, Prime Video, and More
item.description: A guide to every major new film and television series arriving this weekend on Netflix, Hulu, Prime Video, Apple TV, and other major streaming platforms.

item.title: 200 Judges Have Enrolled in AI Training Program; Experts Say More Should Follow
item.description: The Judicial AI Consortium, a free program run by three sitting judges, has attracted 200 members so far, as AI-generated evidence increasingly appears in courtrooms.

item.title: Anthropic Study Finds AI Raises Productivity and Concern About Job Losses
item.description: An Anthropic study found that while AI use increases worker productivity, roughly one in five users expresses concern about potential job displacement as a result.

item.title: Josh Kushner's Firm Makes First Sports Investment with San Francisco Giants Stake
item.description: The investment in the San Francisco Giants marks the firm's first foray into sports ownership and reflects a strategic shift toward non-technology sectors.
